# Health OS — Complete Platform Reference

## Overview
Health OS is a production-grade AI health companion platform built with Next.js 16 App Router. It features a persistent memory engine, comprehensive health analytics dashboard, AI-powered goal tracking with adaptive coaching, and a lifelike 3D avatar with voice conversations. The platform supports 5 Indian languages and serves as a personal health operating system.

## Tech Stack
| Layer | Technology |
|-------|-----------|
| Framework | Next.js 16 (App Router), React 19 |
| Language | TypeScript (strict mode) |
| Styling | Tailwind CSS v4, CSS custom properties |
| State Management | Zustand with persist middleware |
| AI Orchestration | OpenRouter (provider-agnostic) |
| Database | MongoDB (native driver, vector search) |
| 3D Rendering | React Three Fiber, Three.js, drei |
| Charts | Recharts |
| Voice | ElevenLabs TTS, Cartesia TTS, Web Speech API |
| Animation | Framer Motion |
| Icons | Lucide React |

## Route Structure

### Public Routes (Indexable)
| Route | Description | Priority |
|-------|-------------|----------|
| `/` | Landing page with 12 sections | 1.0 |
| `/demo` | Avatar Studio - 3D avatar customization | 0.6 |

### Private Routes (Non-indexable, require auth)
| Route | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `/app` | Main app shell with sidebar + 4 views (chat, dashboard, goals, memory) |
| `/dashboard` | Health analytics dashboard with charts |
| `/goals` | Goal tracking and management |

### Debug/Test Routes (Blocked from search)
| Route | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `/test-cartesia` | Cartesia TTS debug page |

### API Routes
| Route | Methods | Purpose |
|-------|---------|---------|
| `/api/chat` | POST | AI chat with streaming SSE, memory injection, TTS, lipsync |
| `/api/session` | GET, POST | Session CRUD |
| `/api/profile` | GET, POST, PUT | User profile management |
| `/api/voice` | POST | ElevenLabs TTS generation |
| `/api/dashboard` | GET, POST | Dashboard data aggregation |
| `/api/health/metrics` | GET, POST | Health metric logging |
| `/api/health/insights` | GET, POST, PATCH | AI health insights |
| `/api/goals` | GET, POST, PATCH, DELETE | Goal CRUD |
| `/api/goals/evaluate` | POST | Batch goal evaluation |
| `/api/memories` | GET, DELETE | Memory management |

## Memory System
The memory engine uses semantic vector search with MongoDB to provide persistent context:

### Memory Types
- **episodic**: Specific events and conversations
- **health_fact**: Health data points and measurements
- **behavioral**: Behavior patterns and habits
- **emotional**: Emotional states and reactions
- **summary**: Session summaries (auto-generated every 20 messages)

### Memory Pipeline
1. Message created → saved to MongoDB
2. Memory extraction runs in background (non-blocking)
3. Embeddings generated via text-embedding-3-small
4. Stored in vector database
5. Emotional signals detected and stored
6. Session summarization every 20 messages

### Retrieval
- Semantic search with cosine similarity
- Recency weighting
- Token-budgeted context injection
- Configurable importance thresholds

## AI Orchestration

### Model Routing
| Task | Primary | Fallback |
|------|---------|----------|
| Fast Chat | GPT-4o-mini | Mistral Small |
| Reasoning | Claude Sonnet 4 | GPT-4.1 |
| Memory | Mistral Small | - |
| Embeddings | text-embedding-3-small | - |
| Insights | Mistral Small | - |

### 22 AI Roles
mother, father, brother, sister, grandparent, doctor, therapist, nurse, coach, mentor, teacher, friend, best_friend, girlfriend, partner, leader, boss, teammate, spiritual_guide, motivator, caregiver

### 5 AI Modulations
soft_caring, strict_motivational, professional, energetic, calm

### 4 Coaching Styles
strict_coach, supportive_mentor, calm_doctor, accountability_partner

### 5 Languages
English (en), Hindi (hi), Tamil (ta), Telugu (te), Bengali (bn)

### 6 Disease Focus Areas
diabetes, heart, weight_loss, pcos, mental_health, custom

## Health Tracking Features
- **Weight**: Track weight with trend analysis
- **Glucose**: Blood glucose monitoring with reference ranges
- **HbA1c**: Long-term glucose control tracking
- **Sleep**: Sleep hours tracking with optimal range detection
- **Mood**: Emotional state tracking (1-10 scale)
- **Medication**: Adherence tracking with ring visualization
- **Exercise**: Exercise minutes tracking
- **Steps**: Daily step counting
- **Hydration**: Water intake tracking

## Goal Tracking System
8 goal types: weight_loss, hbA1c_reduction, sleep, water_intake, walking, medication, exercise, custom

Features:
- Streak tracking (current + best)
- Progress percentage calculation
- Daily goal evaluation with coaching messages
- Reminder configuration (daily/weekly/custom)
- 4 coaching personalities with distinct communication styles

## 3D Avatar System
- Model format: GLB/FBX
- 18 facial expressions
- Viseme-based lipsync mapping
- 10+ animations (Talking variants, Idle, Rumba, Crying, Laughing, Angry, Terrified, Moonwalk)
- Emotion-to-animation mapping
- HDR environment lighting

## Voice System
- ElevenLabs TTS: 5 voices matching AI modulations
- Cartesia TTS: sonic-2 model
- Web Speech API: browser-based fallback
- Voice recording via Web Speech API
- Audio playback with mute control

## Dashboard Components
- StatCard: Metric display with trend indicator
- WeightChart: Line chart for weight tracking
- GlucoseChart: Line chart with target ranges
- SleepChart: Bar chart for sleep patterns
- MoodTimeline: Area chart for mood tracking
- MedicationTracker: Ring chart for adherence
- WeeklyInsights: AI-generated insight cards

## Onboarding Flow
4-step wizard:
1. Choose AI Role (22 options)
2. Choose AI Modulation (5 options)  
3. Choose Language (5 options)
4. Choose Health Focus (6 options)

## Database Collections (MongoDB)
- users: User profiles with AI configuration
- sessions: Chat sessions
- messages: Individual messages with audio/lipsync metadata
- health_metrics: Time-series health data
- goals: Goal definitions with coaching style
- goal_progress: Daily progress logs
- memories: Memory documents with embeddings
- memory_summaries: Session summaries
- ai_insights: Generated health insights
- vector_store: Generic vector storage

## Environment Variables
OPENROUTER_API_KEY=           # Required
DATABASE_URL=                  # Required (MongoDB)
OPENROUTER_BASE_URL=           # Default: https://openrouter.ai/api/v1
OPENROUTER_MODEL_FAST=         # Default: openai/gpt-4o-mini
OPENROUTER_MODEL_REASONING=    # Default: anthropic/claude-sonnet-4
OPENROUTER_MODEL_MEMORY=       # Default: mistralai/mistral-small
NEXT_PUBLIC_APP_URL=           # Default: http://localhost:3000
ELEVENLABS_API_KEY=            # Optional
CARTESIA_API_KEY=              # Optional

## Security
- API keys are server-side only
- MongoDB connection string stored in environment variables
- No secrets exposed to client bundle
- Audit logging via observability layer

## Deployment
- Optimized for Vercel deployment
- MongoDB Atlas for database (auto-creates collections)
- Environment variables configured in deployment platform
